examples.title: Calculate Total Idle Power from Separate Functions
examples.description: Algorithm to calculate cumulative idle power consumption from multiple separate function chips in a device
examples.code:
FUNCTION CalculateIdlePower(functions[]):
 totalIdlePower ← 0
 FOR EACH function IN functions:
 idlePower ← GetIdlePower(function)
 totalIdlePower ← totalIdlePower + idlePower
 RETURN totalIdlePower

FUNCTION GetAnnualEnergyCost(idlePowerWatts, hoursPerDay, electricityRate):
 dailyEnergy ← (idlePowerWatts / 1000) * hoursPerDay
 annualEnergy ← dailyEnergy * 365
 annualCost ← annualEnergy * electricityRate
 RETURN annualCost

// Example usage:
deviceFunctions ← [
 {name: "CPU", idleWatts: 5},
 {name: "GPU", idleWatts: 15},
 {name: "WiFi", idleWatts: 1},
 {name: "Bluetooth", idleWatts: 0.5},
 {name: "Audio", idleWatts: 0.5}
]

totalIdle ← CalculateIdlePower(deviceFunctions)
cost ← GetAnnualEnergyCost(totalIdle, 20, 8)
OUTPUT "Annual idle power cost: ₹" + cost
examples.explanation: This code calculates the cumulative idle power drain from separate functions in a device. It demonstrates how each specialized chip contributes to total power consumption even when not actively processing data.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is the number of separate functions

examples.title: Hardware Utilization Monitor
examples.description: Code to monitor and optimize hardware utilization to reduce waste from underutilized separate functions
examples.code:
FUNCTION MonitorUtilization(servers[], threshold):
 underutilized ← []
 FOR EACH server IN servers:
 utilization ← CalculateCurrentUtilization(server)
 IF utilization < threshold THEN:
 underutilized.append({
 server: server.id,
 utilization: utilization,
 wastedPower: server.idlePower * (1 - utilization)
 })
 RETURN underutilized

FUNCTION OptimizeResources(underutilized, workloads[]):
 // Try to migrate workloads to consolidate
 sorted ← SortByUtilization(underutilized) // ascending
 FOR EACH server IN sorted:
 IF HasMigratableWorkloads(workloads) THEN:
 MigrateWorkloads(server, targetServer)
 PowerDown(server)

// Main execution
WHILE TRUE:
 servers ← GetAllServers()
 underutilized ← MonitorUtilization(servers, 0.30)
 workloads ← GetActiveWorkloads()
 OptimizeResources(underutilized, workloads)
 Wait(300) // Check every 5 minutes
examples.explanation: This monitoring system identifies servers with low utilization (often due to dedicated separate functions) and consolidates workloads to allow powering down unused hardware, reducing energy waste.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n × m) where n is servers and m is workloads

examples.title: Lifecycle Carbon Footprint Calculator
examples.description: Calculate total carbon footprint from manufacturing, use, and disposal phases for devices with different numbers of separate functions
examples.explanation: This program calculates the complete lifecycle carbon footprint showing how additional separate functions increase manufacturing emissions, and how higher power consumption from dedicated chips increases use-phase emissions.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of function components
